backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing user profiles, website settings, vehicles, visitor stats, credit simulations, product likes, article comments, and contact submissions with role-based access control and blob storage integration.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features documented.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of three frontend files describing Phase 1 foundation components including placeholder UI, basic React Query hooks, and Tailwind CSS configuration.
frontend/index.css: Empty CSS file (content appears to be missing or blank).
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point for the Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Phase 1 placeholder UI component displaying system build status, authentication state, and infrastructure checklist for the Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang application.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with authentication support, handling both anonymous and authenticated identities with automatic query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for Phase 1 backend connectivity testing, providing queries for visitor stats and website settings plus a mutation for incrementing page views.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining comprehensive design tokens for light and dark modes including background, foreground, card, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, and chart colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters and sessionStorage values, supporting both regular query strings and hash-based routing with parameter persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme with sidebar/chart/card colors, custom animations for accordions, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state file defining Phase 1 architecture for Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang automotive website with IC Canister backend, stable storage, relational vehicle database (passenger/commercial), blob media storage, admin authentication, and lifecycle hooks; includes 11+ feature requests tracking implementation status.
